zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Freebody於大約1474年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其時，她的父親Richard Freebody23歲，母親Mrs. Richard Freebody23歲。她於1500年與John Stanley在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1552年5月6日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Freebody于大约1474年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其时，她的父亲Richard Freebody23岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Freebody23岁。她于1500年与John Stanley在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1552年5月6日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其。

nameMeanings.name: Freebody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English fre ‘free’ + bodi ‘body, physique; person, individual’ (Old English frēo, frīo + bodig), used of a ‘free man’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Freebody was born about 1474, in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England, her father, Richard Freebody, was 23 and her mother, Mrs. Richard Freebody, was 23. She married John Stanley in 1500, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 May 1552, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Freebody est née environ 1474, à West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Freebody, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Freebody, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Stanley en 1500, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1552, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Freebody um 1474 in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Freebody 23 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Richard Freebody 23. Sie hat 1500 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom John Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1552 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Freebody è nata il circa 1474 nel West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Freebody, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Richard Freebody, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Stanley nel 1500, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1552, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Freebodyが約1474年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエスト ブロムウィチで生まれた時，父Richard Freebodyは23歳，母Mrs. Richard Freebodyは23歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでJohn Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1552年5月6日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアウエスト ブロムウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Freebody(이)가 대략 1474년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스트 브롬위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Freebody(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Freebody(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 John Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 5월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스트 브롬위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Freebody nasceu aproximadamente 1474, em West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Freebody, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Freebody, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stanley em 1500, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1552, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Freebody родилась около 1474 г. в местности вест бромвич, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Freebody было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Freebody, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stanley в 1500 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 мая 1552 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности вест бромвич, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Freebody nació aproximadamente 1474, en West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Freebody, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Freebody, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Stanley en 1500, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1552, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
